# Zakaria Teffah - R&D Engineer (Full Content)

> Experienced R&D engineer with 14+ years in compilers, formal verification, optimization, and scientific computing. Based in Montpellier, France.

## Professional Summary

I am an experienced professional with 14+ years in computer science, specializing in compilers and formal verification. I'm excited to tackle cutting-edge software & hardware problems.

My expertise spans C/C++ development, combinatorial and numerical optimization, mathematical modelling, and software architecture design. I am specialized in formal verification using Lean, TLA+ and SMT solvers like Z3.

## Core Competencies

- **C++**: Systems programming, performance-critical applications, compiler development and low-level optimization.
- **Rust**: Memory-safe systems programming, concurrent applications, and high-reliability software development.
- **Python**: Scripting, data analysis, ML prototyping, and rapid tool development for scientific computing.
- **Formal Verification**: Mathematical proofs for software correctness using Lean, TLA+, and SMT solvers like Z3.
- **HPC**: Parallel computing, performance optimization, and scientific simulations on high-performance systems.
- **Tech Scouting**: Emerging technology evaluation, innovation tracking, and strategic technical recommendations.

## Technical Skills

### Languages
- C/C++ (advanced)
- Python (advanced)
- Bash (advanced)
- Lean4 (good)
- TLA+ (good)
- MiniZinc (advanced)
- VHDL/Verilog (good)

### Expertise Areas
- Compilers (advanced)
- Numerical Optimization (advanced)
- Mathematical Modelling (advanced)
- Formal Verification (advanced)
- Software Architecture (advanced)

## Professional Experience

### NanoXplore — C++/Python R&D Engineer
**Period**: Feb 2021 – Dec 2025 | **Location**: Montpellier, France

FPGA compiler development, DSP pattern matching, formal verification with SMT solvers, Reduced Ordered Binary Decision Diagram development for equivalence checking, graph/hypergraph algorithms for circuit abstractions.

**Technologies**: C++, Python, SMT Solvers, TLA+, VHDL/Verilog, ROBDD, ModelSim

### Liebherr Aerospace — Scientific Tools Engineer
**Period**: Jan 2015 – Apr 2019 | **Location**: Toulouse, France

Heat transfer algorithms for aircraft icing prediction, scientific computation library for roller bearing modeling, uncertainties propagation computation for sensor-dependent physical quantities.

**Technologies**: C++, Python, Scientific Computing, Numerical Optimization

### Airbus (via Altran) — Methods & Tools Consultant
**Period**: Aug 2011 – Dec 2014 | **Location**: Toulouse, France

Airbus flight simulator stability optimization, aircraft trajectory simulation and optimization tools, multi-physics simulation for A30X wing optimization using kriging ML.

**Technologies**: C++, Optimization, Machine Learning, Design Patterns, Aerodynamics

### Internships

- **IMFT Toulouse** — Graduate Internship (Feb–Jun 2011): Finite volume code for Biot poro-elastic coupling simulation and numerical analysis.
- **Mercator Ocean** — Internship (Jun–Sep 2010, Toulouse): Generation of oceanic initial conditions from meso-scale oceanic re-analysis.
- **Norwegian Meteorological Institute** — Internship (Jul–Aug 2009, Oslo): OSI SAF daily ice drift product development and validation.

## Education

**INSA Toulouse** — Master of Science (2006–2011)
Field: Computer Science, Mathematics and Modelling
Department of Mathematics Engineering

## Spoken Languages

- French (native)
- English (C1 — fluent)
- Spanish (reading knowledge)
- Chinese (reading knowledge)

## Portfolio Projects

### CTU-Solver — Constraint & Integer Programming in Rust
A Rust library combining Constraint Programming (CP) and Integer Programming (IP) with 33+ constraint types, AC-3 propagation, and a simplex solver.
**Tags**: Rust, Constraint Programming, Integer Programming, Optimization
**Category**: Operations Research
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/ctu-solver
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=ctu-solver

### Glass Cutting Optimization — ROADEF 2018
6th place out of 64 teams in the ROADEF/EURO 2018 industrial optimization challenge by Saint-Gobain.
**Tags**: C++, OpenMP, Genetic/Evolutionary, Simulated Annealing, Heuristics
**Category**: Operations Research
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/cut-defi-roadef-2018
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=cut-defi-roadef-2018

### Optimal Texas Hold'em Strategy Laboratory
Texas Hold'em engine with Monte Carlo simulation, formal Lean4 proofs, and RL agents.
**Tags**: Python, Lean4, Monte Carlo, Reinforcement Learning, Machine Learning
**Category**: Game Theory & AI
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/card-game
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=card-game

### Sea Ice Drift Estimation: MCC vs CMCC
Cross-correlation methods for Arctic sea ice drift from satellite imagery, validated against IABP buoy tracks.
**Tags**: Rust, Python, AMSR2 data, ASCAT data
**Category**: Remote sensing
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/sea-ice-drift
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=sea-ice-drift

### Space Altimetry and Continental Hydrology
Multi-level satellite altimetry pipeline: Kalman filtering, kriging, waveform retracking, and multi-mission fusion with Dask.
**Tags**: Python, Kriging, Kalman Filter, SAR, Satellite Altimetry
**Category**: Remote sensing
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/sat-explo
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=sat-explo

### Acoustic Guitar Physical Simulation
Full acoustic chain: 1D string FEM, 2D Kirchhoff-Love soundboard, 3D Yee grid air radiation with PML.
**Tags**: Python, NumPy, SciPy, GetFEM, Gmsh, FEM
**Category**: Scientific Computing
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/sim-guitar
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=sim-guitar

### GMT — Generic Maths Tool
Scientific computing library: Gaussian process regression, tension splines, ridge regression, Monte Carlo simulation, and neural networks.
**Tags**: Python, NumPy, SciPy, Machine Learning, GP Regression
**Category**: Scientific Computing
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/gmt
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=gmt

### Line-Following Robot with micro:bit
A line-following robot using BBC micro:bit, SparkFun MotoBit, and IR sensors with calibration and state-machine control.
**Tags**: MicroPython, micro:bit, Robotics, I2C
**Category**: Robotics
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/line-follow
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=line-follow

### CVWeb
This portfolio website — a bilingual, animated CV built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
**Tags**: Next.js, TypeScript
**GitHub**: https://github.com/zakiller34/cvweb
**Details**: https://www.zakaria-teffah.com/portfolio?project=cvweb
